messages.author: Sgt0ddball
messages.text: https://github.com/g-d-j-evans/MeschaTUI Yes it is a terrible name, yes it is niche, and you may not find it useful. MeshChaTUI is a response to the fact that i wanted a slightly different experience in the terminal than what i could get with meshchat-cli. It is a Textual TUI application using Meshcore_py . My aims were a basic terminal chat application where all messages received are displayed in chronological order regardless of sender. I also wanted all commands to be accessible from the message bar. It is not packaged, so if you want to try it out, you will have to follow the instructions. Anyway, i have spent some time getting this to where i want it to be, and thought that someone else may want to live in the terminal and only use their keyboard, whilst playing with their meshcore radio.
